pillars.title: Security
pillars.description: Simple Web App implements security group rules and access controls. All sensitive configurations are parameterized to enforce organizational standards.

pillars.title: Reliability
pillars.description: Infrastructure as Code ensures consistent, repeatable deployments of Simple Web App.

pillars.title: Cost Optimization
pillars.description: Configurable resource sizing allows teams to match capacity to actual workload requirements.

pillars.title: Performance Efficiency
pillars.description: Load balancing distributes traffic across healthy targets.

pillars.title: Operational Excellence
pillars.description: Pulumi state management tracks all infrastructure changes with full audit trail.
